---
layout: default
title: "Monsoon Session Agenda and Judicial Reforms"
date: 2026-07-17T03:45:56.276368+00:00
summary: "Parliament prepares for the Monsoon Session amid legislative debates, while the Supreme Court pushes for prison reforms and reviews language policies"
run_time_ist: "9:15AM"
---

<article class="digest-post">
  <a class="back-link" href="{{ '/' | relative_url }}">Political Brief</a>
  <p class="post-meta">Gemini Summary: 9:15AM</p>


<h2 class="section-title">India National Politics</h2>

<ul class="digest-points">
  <li><strong>Parliamentary Agenda:</strong> The government plans to introduce five new bills during the upcoming Monsoon Session, though the controversial delimitation package is currently excluded from the agenda.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMinwFBVV95cUxPRzZteHkyR19WcjRnd1B1T0x6UEtxbENTaTZXb3BoR09hWWFqUmxraXdpRDVPekhUel93TjNwMkVGdUUxX3dzOG4xQm9UaXA1c2RnanVUOE1UbkxhMGxpUUhEeklvb1VjVVF0UlZlQUY1YUhZQTJXVWoteW1aZGt3c2YtTVR0VmRaRmVHdFpKRklnQlZhczlJQ1ZZUjh1ZFk?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I8</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I9</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Political Shifts:</strong> Trinamool Rajya Sabha member Koel Mallick has resigned her seat and initiated discussions with BJP leadership, signaling potential realignment.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I10</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Legislative Setback:</strong> A Constitutional Amendment Bill aimed at securing women’s reservation in the Lok Sabha and State Assemblies has failed to pass in the lower house.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiqwFBVV95cUxPSTVKRHVGUXlhNjVqNEczYkNpd1NvbmRYOU5Fd2RIZjV3OHBob0owSzh3LVRXdUVqSDNVZTgtbVZlUG8ybS1wallfSVdTeTRtNENIU0lwV3piczdxV2NEVmE0WC1GSTQyMjR4dkNPb1pqblB2SzNHQjZBRWVXZHpPZXE2bVlQc3NGNEFJVU1NUHJMMFFqSkdRUVFFMGZNRUkzSTc0LXphM1JaLXM?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I11</a></span></li>
</ul>

<h2 class="section-title">Policy and Institutions</h2>

<ul class="digest-points">
  <li><strong>Prisoner Welfare:</strong> The Supreme Court has directed the government to formulate a policy for the early release of terminally ill and elderly prisoners to improve humanitarian standards.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W9</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W7</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Language Policy:</strong> The Supreme Court has expressed concerns regarding the implementation of a third language in Class 9, suggesting that such policies should ideally be introduced starting from Class 6.</li>
</ul>
